# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This is the comprehensive project report for **"Data-Driven Optimization for EV Charging Infrastructure,"** submitted in partial fulfillment of the requirements for Sabudh Major Passion-Project.

Use the navigation bar on the left to explore the chapters of this report.

## Project Summary

* **Goal:** To identify optimal locations for EV charging stations using machine learning.
* **Method:** XGBoost Regression combined with Multi-Criteria Decision Making (MCDM).
* **Outcome:** A prioritized map of the top 300 locations for immediate infrastructure investment.
